title: The Power of Habit: Why We Do What We Do in Life and Business
author: Charles Duhigg
targetAudience: Individuals seeking personal improvement and professionals interested in organizational behavior
relatedBooks: Mindset: The New Psychology of Success by Carol S. Dweck
The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People by Stephen R. Covey
keyInsights: Understanding the habit loop: cue, routine, reward
The impact of habits on personal and professional life
The role of willpower in habit formation
